posts.author: chermainec (Chermaine)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I tried looking for this in the community but was unable to find the answer. I am fairly new at using Monday and am still navigating the features.

Goal
when column (ex: date) changes
create an update + create a new item in another board

Issue:
I can’t seem to run this automation so that it ONLY works when “changes” are made to the date column and not during the first/initial entry of data.

Attempts:
I tried adding a condition: “and if column is NOT empty” in the hopes that this would create the result I need but it still runs the automation.

Question:
Is this even possible?

Thanks!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You’ll need a condition, maybe try another column to base the condition on?
